title: Aloha!
excerpt: Just a quick pop in from Honolulu, Hawaii. I'm teaching two sold out workshops tomorrow and I have been trying to do my best to get some rest and relaxation in as well. Jack was an absolute pro on his…
body:
Just a quick pop in from Honolulu, Hawaii. I'm teaching two sold out workshops tomorrow and I have been trying to do my best to get some rest and relaxation in as well. Jack was an absolute pro on his 38th flight. My mom flew on a different flight (she and JC like to fly American and I prefer Delta) and she arrived just before us. It's JC and my 7th anniversary of our first date and I think the first time we are spending it apart. He is in New York for work and then has to go to France. It's tough when we both have to travel for work to different places, but I think we will both manage ;)

Though it's only been about 24 hours, I think my mom, Jack and I are already on island time. 

Wanted to give you all a heads up that my second exclusive Hawaii stamp set will be for sale at 1pm Pacific starting April 2 at Sakura Lala. The first stamp set is available here as well as tons of adorable washi tapes! Mahalo!
